unit_of_work: repair one approved structural FX EA blocked at Q02 by infrastructure and enqueue a diversity-weighted stage-1 wave

priority_selection.approved_build_preflight: No priority-1 diversity card was faithfully buildable from the available DWX universe at this wake.

skipped_cards.reason: requires unavailable lumber and IEF inputs and retains an unresolved data gate
requires unavailable Treasury/yield, IEF, BIL, and DBC inputs
M15 XAU/index scalper in the already saturated asset class and outside the requested low-frequency emphasis

priority_selection.chosen_recovery: QM5_11903 is an approved ten-pair H1 FX sleeve with 120 historical Q02 INFRA_FAIL rows, no economic Q02 verdict, and no Q03-or-later result.

source_status.source_citation: Jasper Lawler, Price Action Trading Strategy: Supply & Demand Zones, FlowBank, 28 June 2021; underlying market-structure concept attributed to Richard Wyckoff
source_status.strategy_shape: H1 one-to-ten-bar narrow base, two-ATR expansion close, SMA20 ten-bar slope, first fresh zone retest, five-pip structure stop, primary 3R target

diagnosis: No QM5_11903 magic rows or resolver entries existed, leaving every approved symbol/slot unable to satisfy framework initialization.
All ten retained setfiles used slot zero, omitted qm_ea_id and the strategy inputs, and retained pending build metadata.
The binary was stale relative to the current source/framework package.
The source used forbidden raw series calls, global PositionsTotal gating, hard-coded point-to-pip scaling, and an entry news gate ahead of management and exits.
SPEC.md was absent and the retained report/log evidence was insufficient to classify any failure as economic.

repair.framework_series_helpers: Raw iHigh/iLow/iClose calls were replaced by a one-record CopyRates reader plus QM_ATR and QM_SMA. The reader is restricted to the shared H1 new-bar path and carries the reviewed perf-allowed tag for the bounded ten-candle structural scan.
repair.bar_gating: Zone state, trend exit, and entry evaluation share one QM_IsNewBar(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1) edge.
repair.position_scope: Open-position checks and exits are restricted to the current symbol and resolved magic.
repair.risk_and_price_units: Pip buffers use framework conversion/normalization helpers; backtest inputs are fixed-risk only.
repair.management_order: Friday close, management, and strategy exits remain reachable before the entry-only news gate.
repair.request_initialization: QM_EntryRequest is zeroed and every required field is explicitly assigned.
repair.card_conformance: Base-end ATR, SMA20 ten-bar slope, 240-bar zone validity, five-pip stop, 3R primary target, slope exit, and 480-bar timeout use the approved defaults.
repair.deterministic_interpretation: The card's undefined forward-looking 'next visible' ZigZag target is not used; the explicitly primary 3R target is used. A retest is recognized on the first completed H1 bar trading through the limit level and submitted at market on the following tick. Both choices are disclosed in SPEC.md.

verification.build_guardrails: PASS, zero findings across source and ten setfiles
verification.skill_build_guard: PASS: EA registry row, magic rows, and EA directory present

strict_compile.compile_isolation: The main-path source was compiled using the compile wrapper and framework include tree from a synthetic staged snapshot. The staged resolver blob and normalized source blob were equality-guarded before compile; a clean-snapshot build check also passed with zero failures and warnings.

bounded_smoke.reason: FACTORY_OFF.flag was active and four existing MetaTester processes occupied backtest hosts; no additional tester CPU was started.

q02_handoff.stage1_selection_reason: EURUSD is the liquid source carrier, GBPJPY adds a non-USD cross, and AUDUSD adds commodity/carry sensitivity; the probes span EUR, USD, GBP, JPY, and AUD.
